title: fumana spachii subsp. montana
intro: Fumana spachii subsp. montana, also known as Alpine Fumana, is a subspecies of the Fumana spachii plant, a flowering plant in the cistus family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fumana spachii subsp. montana include the potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Fumana spachii subsp. montana can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can also be dried and used in herbal remedies.
